executionArgs.additionalInstruction: In login-related tests (TC001, TC002), use email 'admin@fmb.com' and password 'AdminPassword#2026' for ADMIN. The login API returns the JWT in the 'token' field of the JSON response, not 'access_token'. For role-based checks, confirm that GERENTE credentials ('gerente.norte@fmb.com' and 'FmbPassword#2026') can successfully fetch products with GET /api/admin/products, but cannot mutate products (like POST/PUT/DELETE, returning 403 Forbidden). GERENTE is also forbidden from accessing audit logs with GET /api/admin/reports/audit-logs (returning 403 Forbidden).
